hero.sub: We design and build bilingual websites — Arabic and English, mobile-first, made for how your customers actually browse, message, and book. One-time fee. You own the work.

what.label: WHAT IS NASHR
what.headline: A small studio that builds the website your business deserves.
what.intro1: NASHR is a bilingual web design studio based in Riyadh. We build custom websites for Saudi businesses — restaurants, clinics, salons, contractors, professional services — that have been losing customers because they have no website, or a website that doesn't work hard enough for them.
what.intro2: We are not a large agency. We're a small team that cares about craft, and that means every site we ship is built from scratch around your business, your customers, and how Saudi Arabia actually buys in 2026.
